items.title: Dan Campbell says Kelvin Sheppard is a better defensive coordinator in Year Two
items.summary: Lions head coach Dan Campbell made Kelvin Sheppard one of his first assistant coach hires when he got the job in 2021, and promoted him to defensive coordinator in 2025.
